title: Establishing the Massachusetts data privacy act
summary: For legislation to establish the Massachusetts Data Privacy Protection Act, report the accompanying bill (Senate, No. 2516).
sponsors: Advanced Information Technology, the Internet and Cybersecurity [Jnt]

actions.action: Reported from the committee on Advanced Information Technology, the Internet and Cybersecurity
New draft of S29, S33 and S45
Bill reported favorably by committee and referred to the committee on Senate Ways and Means
Committee recommended ought to pass with an amendment, substituting a new draft, see S2608
Order relative to subject matter adopted
